description: Style NoteHow many summer outfits can really beat the heat? This cap from quiksilver does the trick and does it in style! Match it with a tonal casual shirt or colour block it - it'll leave you looking as hot as the season even as you cool off with the cap!Product DetailsBlack cap with print on the front of the crown, designed ergonomically to Fit different head sizesEyelets all over the crown for ventilationHas a curved visor with stitch detailingCap has a strong adhesive propertyto ensure a snug fit even after repeated useMaterial and Care70% cotton, 27% polyester and 3% elastaneWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
